title: Twenty-one new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta March 26-28
summary: On March 26, YKHC reports thirteen new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. New COVID-19 Cases The 13 are residents in: Aniak (1) Bethel (1) Hooper Bay (1) Kotlik (1) Kwigillingok (6) Marshall (1) Tuntutuliak (1) YKHC service area village (1) — On March 27, YKHC reports eight new cases of COVID-19 in...

title: Monster Tsunamis in Alaska
summary: An earthquake and landslide in Lituya Bay unleashed the largest wave ever recorded, and there are more monster tsunamis in Alaska history. The post Monster Tsunamis in Alaska appeared first on Alaska Magazine .
